summary: Crisp soundboard capture with huge bass and a standout Saint of Circumstance/Drums segment, though one reviewer jokes about missing a Big River moment.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear sound and powerful low end, especially on the Saint of Circumstance transition into an extended Drums section. Reviewers note the bass shines and the mix feels very clean, while another comment humorously laments that Bob’s desire to play “Big River” wasn’t fulfilled. Overall the performance is well‑received despite the brief setlist joke.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights excellent soundboard quality and strong musical moments; a second low‑star, off‑topic comment pulls the average down but offers little concrete criticism, leading to a solid but not flawless rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the audio as crisp and note an especially strong bass presence; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive remarks focus on the deep bass and a well‑executed drum segment, suggesting a satisfying flow despite limited commentary on overall set structure.

band_member_comments.Bob: Reviewer jokes that Bob (Bobby) wanted to play 'Big River', indicating his presence in the setlist discussion.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum segment is highlighted as a highlight of the performance.
